original: As you are walking up to your ship, you notice something you were not expecting. Amber is standing outside the ship fidgeting bashfully and looking around as if waiting for someone. That someone is most likely you. You walk over to Amber and notice something different about her. Awkwardly, Amber fidgets about standing in front of the ship. Amber acts nervously, the cause becomes obvious looking at her head to toe. She’s wearing a regal bright red dress with small straps that cover up her shoulders. Her impressive bust is pushed up by the tight-fitting clothing, looking more than a little uncomfortable. The pressed up chest spills out the top of her dress. Light sparkles float around her getting a closer look; an inspection reveals glitter on her face and her dress, making her shine beautifully. The dress covers her entire front including some of the deer parts of her body, while the back stops at the point her human and deer halves connect. As you reach her, you also notice her hair is done up as well, loose braids falling off to the side; she must’ve gotten some help with that. On closer inspection, her hair bounces with a light spring and a gentle sheen. As her hair shifts, the sheen tricks your eyes momentarily into seeing a gentle, graceful fire burning. She continues to look around until she sees you walking up to her and looks away from you bashfully. “What’s all this Amber? I’m surprised to see you off the ship, let alone wearing a dress.” You give her another once-over; the bashful taur’s hand creeps up to her hair and idly twirls a stray curl... “I just wanted to do something special for you, e-even if only once.” Amber’s face turns bright red as she speaks. Her tail sways slowly behind her as she twirls her hair in a finger. It is really cute to see her acting so bashful honestly. You just smile at her and can’t help but chuckle a little. Amber’s back legs shuffle nervously, gently tapping her hooves on the ground. “So um would you want to go out on a date with me this holiday season please?” Are you really going to turn down this poor girl that has clearly put a lot of effort into preparing for this night?
